name: Signpost
description: A weathered wooden signpost stands at the center of the square, its cracked boards pointing toward the Town Hall, the Market, the Temple Court, and the Rusty Flagon Inn.

name: Notice Board
description: W.B.L. Wayfarer's Bureau of Logistics
"Through the careful application of tiered pathing matrices, regional outcome harmonisation, and longitudinal readiness mapping, all journeys may be made legible."
Someone has scratched underneath in a much less confident hand:
"Nobody knows what this means."

name: Fountain
description: A stone fountain carved with leaping fish and swirling wave motifs. Cool, clear water bubbles up from a central spout and spills into the basin below. A few copper coins glint at the bottom.

consumableEffects.name: Refreshing Drink
consumableEffects.description: The cool water soothes your throat and refreshes your body. A powerful warmth travels through you, knitting every wound closed.

name: Ale Mug
description: A thick clay mug, still half-full of dark, frothy ale. It smells of hops and something faintly smoky. The rim is chipped from countless table-slams.

name: Wanted Poster
description: A rough parchment poster nailed to the tavern wall. A crude sketch of a hooded figure stares back at you. WANTED - DEAD OR ALIVE. 500 gold. Inquire at the Guard Post.

name: Straw Mattress
description: A thin mattress stuffed with dry straw, pushed against the loft wall. It looks like it would offer only modest comfort, but it beats sleeping on the floor.

name: Cracked Window
description: A small glass pane, cracked diagonally from corner to corner. Through it you can see the town square below. The crack is stuffed with a rag to keep the wind out.

name: Council Bell
description: A handbell of polished brass rests on a clerk's table near the hall entrance. Its handle is worn smooth from years of summoning petitioners and councilors alike.

name: Town Charter
description: A framed charter hangs beneath the town crest, its ink faded but still legible. Every mayor since the town's founding has signed the lower margin in a careful hand.

name: Loan Ledger
description: Page after page of careful columns record harvest advances, rebuilding loans, and the names of families who have trusted the bank through lean winters.

name: Iron Strongbox
description: An ironbound strongbox sits beneath the teller's counter, its lockplate burnished bright by years of keys and anxious glances.

name: Duty Board
description: A slate board lists watches, patrol routes, and a growing tally of boots overdue for repair. Someone has added a note in chalk: Check the east road before dusk.

name: Spear Rack
description: A rack of ash-wood spears stands beneath the barracks eaves, each shaft nicked and re-oiled so often that the grain shines through the wear.

name: Bread Loaf
description: A round loaf of dark bread, still faintly warm. Its crust is hard and dusted with flour. It smells wonderfully of a wood-fired oven. The price tag reads 2 copper.

consumableEffects.name: Hearty Fullness
consumableEffects.description: The dense loaf settles warmly in your stomach and puts a little strength back into your legs.

name: Strange Trinket
description: A small brass object of indeterminate purpose, covered in tiny symbols that might be runes. It feels oddly warm to the touch. The vendor claims it brings luck.

name: Market Awning
description: A patched canvas awning stretches above the busiest stall line, throwing striped shadows over baskets of onions, wax, and old iron fittings.

name: Shop Counter
description: A stout oak counter divides the store from its customers, scarred by knife points, dropped nails, and decades of haggling.

name: Supply Crates
description: Crates stamped with millers' marks and caravan seals are stacked shoulder high against the wall, filled with lamp oil, twine, and wrapped bundles of everyday necessity.

name: Travel Rope
description: A coil of sturdy hemp rope, rubbed with wax to keep out damp. A little card tied through the knot reads: Twelve fathoms. Don't waste them.

name: Tinderbox
description: A compact brass tinderbox containing flint, steel, and a pinch of dry tinder wrapped in oilcloth. It smells faintly of lamp smoke and resin.

name: Health Potion
description: A small glass vial stopped with a cork, filled with a vivid crimson liquid. It glows faintly in dim light. The label reads: Restores vitality. Do not mix with moonwort extract.

consumableEffects.name: Restored Vitality
consumableEffects.description: The crimson tonic burns for a heartbeat, then a rush of warmth floods your limbs.

name: Mysterious Powder
description: A twist of paper filled with a fine, iridescent powder that shifts between silver and green. It smells faintly of pine and ozone. The alchemist watches you closely when you touch it.

consumableEffects.name: Clear Focus
consumableEffects.description: The sparkling dust flashes cold across your tongue, and your thoughts sharpen at once.

name: Drying Herb Bundle
description: Bundles of rosemary, feverfew, and bitterroot hang upside down from a ceiling beam, drying into something sharp enough to clear the head from across the room.

name: Broken Arrow
description: A snapped arrow shaft with the fletchings still attached, goose feathers dyed red. The head is missing. The wood is old and weathered.

name: Odd Mushroom
description: A pale, knobby mushroom with dark spots ringed in faint violet. It does not match any species you recognise. It smells earthy and faintly sweet. Eating it seems unwise.

consumableEffects.name: Bitter Numbness
consumableEffects.description: A bitter numbness creeps from your tongue into your veins. This was a terrible idea.
consumableEffects.endDescription: At last, the bitter numbness drains away and feeling returns to your limbs.

consumableEffects.name: Spore Intoxication
consumableEffects.description: The mushroom tastes wrong. Moments later, the shadows seem far more interested in you than they should be. Your tongue suddenly seems eager to betray you.
consumableEffects.endDescription: The room finally steadies, and your thoughts feel like your own again.
shoutTemplates: THE MOSS KNOWS MY TRUE NAME!
WHO STOLE THE FLOOR AND REPLACED IT WITH ANOTHER FLOOR?
IF ANYONE SEES MY DIGNITY, TELL IT I MISS IT!
IF THE TREES START ASKING QUESTIONS, SAY NOTHING!
I WOULD LIKE TO APOLOGIZE TO THAT MUSHROOM'S ENTIRE FAMILY!
MY BONES ARE WHISPERING, AND I DON'T CARE FOR THEIR TONE!
WHO KEEPS MOVING THE AIR AROUND?
I SAW A WIZARD IN MY EYELIDS!

name: Inn Hearth
description: A wide stone hearth dominates the common-room wall, its fire banked low beneath a kettle and a row of drying boots.

name: Baker's Oven
description: A brick oven radiates the steady, patient heat of a craft practiced every morning for years. The stone lip is dusted white with fresh flour.

name: Flour Sack
description: A burlap sack of milled flour leans against the bakery wall, stitched shut with blue twine and marked with the miller's seal.

name: Laundry Line
description: Shirts, blankets, and children's socks flutter from a rope line strung between cottage eaves, giving the lane a lived-in softness despite the packed mud below.

name: Horse Tack
description: Bridles, saddle blankets, and curry combs hang from hooks under the stable eaves, all smelling of leather oil, hay, and rain-damp horse.

name: Temple Candles
description: Rows of stubby prayer candles flicker in red clay holders, their wax pooled into layered drifts that speak of many quiet petitions.

name: Grave Marker
description: A lichen-flecked marker stone bears a name so worn it can only be read when the light hits from the side. Someone has recently set a fresh sprig of rosemary beside it.

name: Broken Idol
description: The upper half of a stone idol lies toppled beside the ruined shrine altar, its face softened by rain and ivy but still solemn beneath the damage.

name: Memorial Plaque
description: A bronze plaque set into the old memorial bears the names of those who never returned from the frontier road. The metal has been rubbed bright by passing hands.

name: Portcullis
description: Heavy iron teeth hang in the gatehouse arch, blackened by age and weather but clean where the chains still haul them up and down.

name: Watch Lantern
description: A hooded watch lantern hangs ready near the parapet, its panes polished clean so the guard can signal the road below even in hard weather.

name: Boarded Door
description: Rough planks have been nailed across the cottage door from the outside. The wood is old, but not old enough to explain why no one ever removed them.

name: Glowing Mushroom
description: A cluster of large mushrooms that emit a steady, cool blue-white bioluminescence. Running your finger along the cap leaves a faint glowing smear.

name: Luminescent Healing Moss
description: A soft, glowing patch of moss that grows in the damp crevices of the cave. Ancient pilgrims claimed it has restorative properties. Crushing it against a wound is said to heal injuries instantly (+25 HP).

consumableEffects.name: Mending Glow
consumableEffects.description: You press the glowing moss to your wounds, and its cool light sinks gently into the hurt.

name: Animal Tracks
description: A series of large paw prints pressed deep into the soft earth. Four toes, no claw marks. The tracks lead deeper into the forest and do not return.

name: Fresh Paw Prints
description: A neat line of fresh paw prints pressed into damp soil. The stride is steady and purposeful, and the trail bends toward denser brush to the east.

name: Mossy Stone
description: A low standing stone draped in velvet-green moss. Someone has scratched a small paw symbol into one side, almost hidden beneath lichen.

name: Weathered Stone
description: A broad weathered stone rises from the roots of the ancient oak. Its surface is worn smooth by time, except for a narrow slot where a blade once rested.

name: Ancient Oak
description: An immense oak tree towers above the grove, its limbs spread like a vaulted roof. Its bark is scarred with old symbols that speak of vows kept through generations.

name: Waymarker Cairn
description: A waist-high stack of flat stones marks the old ridge trail. Someone has pressed fresh ash into the cracks, tracing the outline of a lantern.

name: Switchback Steps
description: A run of chiselled footholds worn slick by years of rain and boot leather. Faded chalk arrows still point climbers onward, though half now lead into bare rock where the mountain has shifted.

name: Trail Bells
description: A handful of bronze bells hang from old posts and ribbon cords above the gorge path. Their chimes are thin and irregular, but still loud enough to guide travelers through fog and dark.

name: Scree Marker
description: A broken guide post has been rebuilt from stacked slate and a strip of red cloth. Someone has scratched a lantern symbol into the soft stone to keep the path from vanishing beneath the slide.

name: Cold Brazier
description: A squat iron brazier sits in the center of the ruined waystation, packed with ash and rainwater. The soot around its rim suggests it once burned every night.

name: Beacon Steps
description: These narrow stone stairs are flanked by broken plinths where fire baskets once stood. Melted wax, ash, and old soot have hardened in the seams like black glass.

name: Guide Ropes
description: Thick travel ropes are knotted between iron spikes along the broken span. The fibers are frayed and furred with frost, but they still hold fast against the cliff.

name: Shrine Steps
description: Broad, shallow steps rise between standing stones etched with worn prayers. Travelers once climbed here in single file, leaving wax drippings, tokens, and scraps of ribbon in the cracks.

name: Prayer Ribbons
description: Dozens of faded ribbons are tied to the branch-posts on the ledge, each one stiff with rain and sun. Names and promises have been inked onto the cloth in a dozen hands.

name: Ember Lantern
description: An old brass lantern with amber-glass panes and a soot-dark handle. The housing is dented, but the wick inside has been kept dry beneath a careful seal.

name: Worn Leather Ball
description: A scuffed leather ball, well-loved and much-used.
It's exactly the kind of thing a child — or a dog — would chase with pure joy.
Stitched into the leather is a faded name: Joy.

name: Iron Sword
description: A single-edged iron sword hanging from a wall hook. The blade is solid and well-balanced. A strip of worn leather wraps the hilt. The price chalked on a slate below reads 15 silver.

name: Leather Shield
description: A round shield faced with thick boiled leather over a wooden frame. A central iron boss is riveted in place. Scuff marks at the edges hint at real use. Sturdy and light.

name: Anvil
description: A massive iron anvil bolted to a thick hardwood stump. Its top face is polished mirror-smooth from years of use, while the edges are scored with hammer nicks.

name: Obi's Oath
description: Named for Obi, the faithful hound who never left his master's side.
Legends say the blade carries the spirit of unwavering loyalty —
striking hardest when wielded in defence of those you would never abandon.
Ancient runes flicker faintly across the blade.
One line burns brighter than the rest:

He walked beside the one who shaped this world.
Not as servant.
But as friend.
pickupNarrative: As you approach, the brass tag you carry gives a single answering pulse.
At once, the grove falls still. Leaves stop whispering overhead. Even the light between the branches seems to hold its breath.
When your hand closes around the hilt, {item} slides free without resistance, as if it has been waiting for you all along.
Amber fire wakes in the runes along the blade, and a familiar warmth gathers beneath the roots nearby.
The Keeper of the Bond lowers his head. "Then let it be witnessed, {player}. Not by conquest. Not by blood. But by love that remained."
Warmth travels from the hilt into your palm, deep and familiar, like a heartbeat answering another across a great distance.
You do not merely claim the oath. You are entrusted with it.

description: Obi rests beneath the roots of the ancient oak, golden coat bright against the moss and leaf-fall.
The usual restlessness in {pronounPossessive} limbs has given way to a deep, peaceful stillness.
{pronounSubjectCap} watches you with bright amber eyes, tail thumping softly now and then as though content simply to share the moment.
talkTemplates: Obi rises at your voice, pads close, and presses his brow gently against your hand before settling again beneath the oak.
For once Obi does not bark. {pronounSubjectCap} sits beside you in companionable silence, then gives the ground a single, contented tail-thump.
Obi looks from you to the sword and back again, then lowers {pronounPossessive} head in a solemn bow that feels strangely like recognition.
Obi circles once around your feet, touches {pronounPossessive} nose to the blade's hilt, and returns to the roots with a satisfied huff.
interactTemplates: A soft rush of leaves stirs beneath the ancient oak as Obi rises to greet {player}, tail thumping once like a quiet salute to the oath now carried forward.
Obi lifts {pronounPossessive} head as {player} approaches, then bows it with solemn grace, as though honoring both the bearer and the vow they have claimed.
Beneath the roots, Obi watches {player} with bright, steady eyes, and for a moment the whole grove seems to acknowledge what {player} has achieved.
Obi pads once around {player}, touches {pronounPossessive} muzzle to the hilt at their side, and settles again beneath the oak with the air of a guardian finally at peace.

prerequisiteFailMessage: The sword does not stir. Something about you feels... incomplete. As if the oath demands a witness — one that has not yet been found.

name: Paw Shard
description: A fragment of brass shaped like a paw print, warm to the touch.
The metal seems almost alive — it pulses faintly when you hold it close.
Loyalty is not claimed. It is proven.

name: Heart Shard
description: A fragment of brass in the shape of a small heart, worn smooth by time.
It feels heavier than it looks — as if it carries the weight of every brave deed.
Courage is not the absence of fear, but the will to act despite it.

name: Ball Shard
description: A fragment of brass etched with the outline of a ball, scuffed and joyful.
Holding it fills you with an inexplicable urge to smile.
Even heroes need to remember the simple joys.

name: Compass Shard
description: A fragment of brass bearing a tiny compass rose, its needle forever pointing true.
When you're lost, it seems to grow warmer — guiding you home.
No matter how lost the road becomes, purpose lights the way.

name: Wayfarer's Token
description: A thumb-sized iron token stamped with a lantern above a winding road. It carries a faint, steady warmth, as if it still remembers the watchfire it once served.

name: Obi's Collar Tag
description: A complete brass tag, reassembled from four ancient fragments.
The name Obi gleams on one side. On the reverse, four symbols shine:
a paw, a heart, a ball, and a compass — united at last.
The tag hums with warmth, as if recognizing its rightful bearer.
He walked beside the one who shaped this world. Not as servant. But as friend.

name: Weapon Rack
description: A sturdy wooden rack holding an assortment of practice weapons — blunted blades, weighted staves, and padded clubs. Each slot is labeled with care: "Return after use."

name: Practice Sword
description: A wooden training sword, weighted to match a real blade. The edges are rounded and wrapped in leather to prevent serious injury. Ideal for beginners learning the basics of combat.

name: Archery Target
description: A large circular target made of tightly bundled straw, mounted on a wooden frame. Concentric circles are painted in red and white. Several arrows protrude from various rings, and a few have missed entirely.
